## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (or no tests apply)
- [ ] HTML / CSS / link-check jobs pass on CI
- [ ] Docs updated (tool README / SPEC, `docs/`, root README) where relevant
- [ ] No emojis in code, commits, or UI copy (root README section headers are the one exception)
- [ ] No ToS-violating scrapers, secrets committed, or private API keys
